message:
fix(storage): add retry loop for disk-critical WBQ enqueue

Fixed test helper to properly retry when WBQ enqueue returns
SkippedDiskCritical status instead of immediately panicking.
Now waits up to deadline with 25ms sleep intervals between retries.

This prevents spurious test failures during transient disk pressure
conditions while still detecting genuine persistent failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
